response.justification: Strong senior engineer with broad full-stack, Linux, and open-source experience, plus a founder role that demonstrates architectural ownership. However, the role requires German at C1 minimum and the candidate self-reports only Basic German, which is a hard blocker. There is also no explicit evidence of leading or mentoring an interdisciplinary team at the scale this Head of Development role demands, and UML/formal architecture modeling is not highlighted.
strengths: Deep, diverse engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and Linux/open-source ecosystems
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates architectural design and long-term ownership of an open-source platform
Strong craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, and public talks indicate mentoring aptitude
concerns: German only at Basic level, far below the required C1 threshold
No clear track record of formally leading or managing an interdisciplinary team
Limited explicit evidence of UML modeling, requirements management, and IT security/compliance leadership

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal team leadership experience
